FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: AI Detects Support at MA20 as China PMI Strengthens JPY Appeal
tldr_points: Central bank gold buying supports USD
FX.excerpt: JPY gains on China manufacturing strength, USD pressured by gold-buying central banks
FX.comment: Resistance at 155.00 with improving Chinese PMI supporting JPY

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Earnings Momentum and Fed Pause Support Bullish Continuation
tldr_points: Big tech earnings (GOOGL, AMZN, META, MSFT) driving index momentum higher
Fed signals pause on further hikes, reducing rate volatility headwind
Technical structure remains constructive with price holding above key moving averages
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 positioned for upside as earnings beat and Fed pause align
STOCKS.comment: Earnings momentum and Fed pause support continued upside toward all-time highs

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: AI Identifies Bearish Divergence as Fed Holds Rates
tldr_points: BTC slides to $75k as Fed holds rates, creating downward pressure.
On-chain sell pressure intensifies near $75k resistance while volume wanes.
AI payment protocol rollout and ZEC trust volume gains provide modest upside catalysts.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC falls to $75k on Fed hold; sell pressure rises, MA20 flat, RSI neutral, AI-driven infrastructure offers limited upside.
CRYPTO.comment: BTC falls to $75k on Fed hold; sell pressure rises, MA20 flat, RSI neutral, AI-driven infrastructure offers limited upside.
